subject: [PATCH v2 20/21] nfsd: reset thread skip index when advancing pools in rpc_status dumpit

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch fixes an issue in the NFS daemon where when resuming a netlink dump of rpc_status, the thread skip count was applied to every pool, not just the current one. As a result, some threads were silently omitted from the dump. The patch resets the thread skip index only for the current pool and starts each subsequent pool from thread 0, ensuring that all threads are included in the dump.
